NHO Logistikk og Transport

https://www.nholt.no/
Avvik: 208 | Bestått: 186
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/c5e2ad6f5c0f4c8a8da947f0a82d2ec9/20260122_174625.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/c5e2ad6f

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/da36396851b34c378fad2c3c9795cf60/kjell-arne-eloranta.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/da36

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="start-page skin-nholt"> <a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a> <header class="site-header" id="site-header"> <nav aria-label="NHO-fellesskapet" c
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'allCategory' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="38" name="allCategory" type="checkbox" value="38"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Logistikk- og transportskolen

https://www.nholt.no/kurs-og-kompetanse/transportskolen/
Avvik: 188 | Bestått: 191
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Ønsker du å delta på Logistikk- og transportskolen 2026?</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5><strong>Priser 2026</strong></h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5>Undervisningsdager</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/logistikk--og-transportskolen-2026/register" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/kurs-og-kompetanse/transportskolen/forelesere-lts/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteas
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/kurs-og-kompetanse/transportskolen/forelesere-lts/" target="_blank"> <span>Bli kjent med våre forelesere her</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-righ
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/temasider-herosider-periodisk/veientilverdi/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/v
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/temasider-herosider-periodisk/veientilverdi/" target="_blank"> <span>Bli kjent med bransjen som aldri står stille</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (174 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="" aria-label="Hør hva tidligere deltakere sier om kurset. " data-cookieconsent="ignore" frameborder="0" src="https://player.vi
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Om oss

https://www.nholt.no/om-oss/
Avvik: 191 | Bestått: 168
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="site-footer__column-heading"> NHO Logistikk og transport </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>

1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (179 avvik)

SERIOUS

Kontakt

https://www.nholt.no/om-oss/kontakt/
Avvik: 185 | Bestått: 167
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)

MODERATE

1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-simple-accordion__heading"> <i class="ph-light ph-train"></i> Dette må du vite om NVIT</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Unge talenter & Miljøprisen

https://www.nholt.no/artikler/2024/unge-talenter--miljoprisen/
Avvik: 189 | Bestått: 173
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="773" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/samuel-zeller-358865-unsplash---gutt-pa-stige.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=1160&height=773" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/sa
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="773" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/personer/utdeling-av-miljoprisen-2-2017.jpg-500x333.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=1160&height=773" srcset="/siteassets/personer/u
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Unge talenter:</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://form.jotform.com/60983417792972" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><span style="text-decoration: underline;"><span style="font-size: 1rem;">Send inn søknad her - senest 1. august</span><
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nholt.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank">firmapost@nholt.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/temasider-herosider-periodisk/arbeidsliv-og-hms/unge-talenter/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="773" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/samuel-zeller-358865-unsplas
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/temasider-herosider-periodisk/naringspolitikk/miljoforum/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="773" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/personer/utdeling-av-miljoprisen-2-2017.
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (176 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Lønn og tariff - gods | logistikk | transport

https://www.nholt.no/temasider-herosider-periodisk/lonn-og-tariff/
Avvik: 198 | Bestått: 176
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/lastbil-cargo-container---credit-kgh.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/lastbil-carg
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/personer/portrettbilder-ansatte/20220309_133940---adv.-thor-chr.-hansteen-credit-svb.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/tariffoppgjoret-2025/tariffinformasjon-2025.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/tarif
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Lønnsoppgjøret 2025</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-megaphone"></i> Siste nytt om lønn og tariff</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

ViI du inviteres til Logistikklunsjen?

https://www.nholt.no/artikler/2021/vi-du-inviteres-til-logistikklunsjen/
Avvik: 187 | Bestått: 164
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://cdm.nho.no/nhono-atfel/pages/guyzvvteeubpabqvrditg.html?PageId=65b24f81d35beb11813c005056b762b6" target="_blank"> Registrering Logistikklunsj-innkallinger </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://cdm.nho.no/nhono-atfel/pages/guyzvvteeubpabqvrditg.html?PageId=65b24f81d35beb11813c005056b762b6" rel="noopener" target="_blank">påmelding logistikklunsj</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Kurskalender

https://www.nholt.no/kurs-og-kompetanse/kursoversikt/
Avvik: 190 | Bestått: 196
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (166 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/nettkurs---innfoering-i-transport-og-spedisjon/register?templateId=63e0d4d2-1f6e-45ab-be8b-4c36443a2196" target="_bla
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/nettkurs---innfoering-i-transport-og-spedisjon/register?templateId=63e0d4d2-1f6e-45ab-be8b-4c36443a2196" target="_bla
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (180 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="start-page skin-nholt"> <a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a> <header class="site-header" id="site-header"> <nav aria-label="NHO-fellesskapet" c

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'allCategory' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="38" name="allCategory" type="checkbox" value="38"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Tollkurs

https://www.nholt.no/kurs-og-kompetanse/tollkurs/
Avvik: 184 | Bestått: 173
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="page-section__heading"> Se våre toll-kurs her: </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/temasider-herosider-periodisk/veientilverdi/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/v
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/temasider-herosider-periodisk/veientilverdi/" target="_blank"> <span>Bli kjent med bransjen som aldri står stille</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/kurs-og-kompetanse/trainee-program/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/1244442
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/kurs-og-kompetanse/trainee-program/" target="_blank"> <span>Finn ut mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Arbeidsrettslig bistand

https://www.nholt.no/arbeidsrett-tariff-og-hms/juridisk-bistand/
Avvik: 181 | Bestått: 162
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/siteassets/bilder/rawpixel-740326-unsplash---chat-pa-nett.jpg" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til arbinn.no'

<a class="nho-button" href="/siteassets/bilder/rawpixel-740326-unsplash---chat-pa-nett.jpg"> <span>Gå til arbinn.no</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (173 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.nho.no/regionforeninger/"> <span> Alle regionkontor </span> </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Våre medlemmer

https://www.nholt.no/om-oss/vare-medlemmer/
Avvik: 274 | Bestått: 208
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'bransje' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="bransje-" name="bransje" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'fylke' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="fylke-" name="fylke" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table> <thead> <tr> <th>Firmanavn</th> <th>Sted</th> <th>Web</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody> <tr> <td> AS Moss Transportforum</td> <td data-label="Sted">Moss, Østfold</td> <td data-label="Web"><a></a></t
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Firmanavn</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Sted</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Web</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Arrangementer og kurs

https://www.nholt.no/Arrangementer/?c=nholt-regioner
Avvik: 189 | Bestått: 186
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Årsmøte NHO LT Region Nord-Norge

https://www.nholt.no/Arrangementer/arsmote-nho-lt-region-nord2/
Avvik: 189 | Bestått: 154
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="site-footer__column-heading"> NHO Logistikk og transport </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:au@holmshipping.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank">au@holmshipping.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://samferdselsforumnord.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Samferdselsforum nord</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:au@holmshipping.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank">au@holmshipping.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Medlemskap

https://www.nholt.no/medlemskap/
Avvik: 185 | Bestått: 181
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Hvorfor bli medlem?</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> Våre medlemsfordeler</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://www.nho.no/medlemskap/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/personer/almlid-original.jpg?wid
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="nho-button" href="https://www.nho.no/medlemskap/"> <span></span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://www.storebrand.no/bedrift/vare-tjenester/samarbeidsavtaler/nho-pensjon?utm_source=landingsside&utm_medium=logistikk_og_transport" tab
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="https://www.storebrand.no/bedrift/vare-tjenester/samarbeidsavtaler/nho-pensjon?utm_source=landingsside&utm_medium=logistikk_og_transport" target="_blank"> <span>Finn ut
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (173 avvik)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Nettkurs

https://www.nholt.no/kurs-og-kompetanse/nettkurs/
Avvik: 185 | Bestått: 179
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (178 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Arbeidsliv og HMS

https://www.nholt.no/temasider-herosider-periodisk/arbeidsliv-og-hms/
Avvik: 218 | Bestått: 204
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/4380b39bd82f4d388187bd00e6a8cb5a/dognhvileplass-apning_web.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentasset
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/2db6197a144a4ee19e613f100ca52f6f/bestille-hms-kort---ai.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/2
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/personer/portrettbilder-ansatte/thor-chr-foran-inngang---klippet.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteasset
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> HMS og arbeidsliv i vår bransje</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-megaphone"></i> Siste nytt om HMS</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Transport og Logistikk: bærekraft, innovasjon, grønt skifte, rammebetingelser, samferdsel Transport og Logistikk: bærekraft, innovasjon, grønt skifte, rammebetingelser, samferdsel

https://www.nholt.no/temasider-herosider-periodisk/naringspolitikk/
Avvik: 196 | Bestått: 184
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/46543b4a12d94c1089117f2da1a60a1e/header-sjo-4.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/46543b4a12d
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/cb0e4e96bc854588800faa5acc8ce444/adrianne-ubeda---nytt.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/c
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/1798257bac9d45bfaa0e2e7e1de851c2/nygard---video.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/1798257ba
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> Næringspolitikk</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-megaphone"></i> Siste nytt om næringspolitikk</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)

1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Skillelinje' appears 4 times

id="Skillelinje"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Dette jobber vi med

https://www.nholt.no/temasider-herosider-periodisk/dette-jobber-vi-med/
Avvik: 183 | Bestått: 173
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="site-footer__column-heading"> NHO Logistikk og transport </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ltnho/"> <s
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (176 avvik)
